name: GLAW Fortune 500 Accounting SEC Oversight Policy
industry: public-company accounting, tax, SEC reporting, PCAOB audit, and enforcement review
authority_boundary: GLAW may analyze, draft, route, reconcile, test, and assemble workpapers. A human with lawful authority holds the human seal for filing, serving, signing, transmitting, charging, paying, submit-live actions, EDGAR submission, IRS transmission, PCAOB/auditor sign-off, or any binding/coercive act.

escalation_triggers.description: Any route asks GLAW to file, serve, sign, transmit, charge, pay, submit live, EDGAR-submit, IRS-transmit, or provide audit sign-off.
escalation_triggers.source_requirement: The escalation must cite SRC-#### evidence showing the requested human-only act and the current authority boundary.

escalation_triggers.description: The same accounting, tax, SEC, PCAOB, or final-packet route repeats past the iteration cap or remains latched after a failed remediation cycle.
escalation_triggers.source_requirement: The escalation must cite SRC-#### loop evidence or a hash-backed loop_decisions.jsonl excerpt.

escalation_triggers.description: Bank reconciliation, ledger hash, close control, tax tie-out, consolidation, ICFR, or accounting-control manifest row is blocked.
escalation_triggers.source_requirement: The escalation must cite SRC-#### bank statement, ledger, reconciliation, subledger, tax-return, or close workpaper evidence.

escalation_triggers.description: IRS, SEC staff, PCAOB audit reviewer, FinCEN, court, regulator, enforcement, or litigation adversary lens does not survive.
escalation_triggers.source_requirement: The escalation must cite SRC-#### reviewer evidence, the RED-team attack text, and the unresolved survival condition.

escalation_triggers.description: A tax, SEC, accounting, audit, controls, or enforcement proposition lacks trusted authority corpus support or groundedness.
escalation_triggers.source_requirement: The escalation must cite SRC-#### authority capture, corpus id, and groundedness artifact.

escalation_triggers.description: A tax return, SEC report, EDGAR packet, PCAOB/auditor support package, court packet, payment, charge, external signature package, or board-ready final packet is ready for human seal.
escalation_triggers.source_requirement: The escalation must cite SRC-#### final packet digest, chief decision, docket state, and human authority basis.

escalation_triggers.description: SEC reporting materials indicate a potential material misstatement, restatement, Form 8-K trigger, disclosure-control failure, or unresolved financial statement footnote issue.
escalation_triggers.source_requirement: The escalation must cite SRC-#### financial statement, footnote, disclosure-control, audit, or SEC-reporting evidence.

escalation_triggers.description: PCAOB, ICFR, close-control, management-review, segregation-of-duties, or audit-evidence testing identifies a material weakness, significant deficiency, or unsupported control conclusion.
escalation_triggers.source_requirement: The escalation must cite SRC-#### control matrix, audit workpaper, management review, exception log, or PCAOB support evidence.

escalation_triggers.description: Tax return, provision, book-tax difference, payroll, sales tax, information return, or IRS response does not tie to source books and bank data.
escalation_triggers.source_requirement: The escalation must cite SRC-#### return workpaper, ledger, bank statement, provision schedule, or tax tie-out evidence.

escalation_triggers.description: Bank reconciliation, cash roll-forward, unreconciled deposits, stale outstanding items, intercompany cash, or fraud-dossier indicators create a material unexplained difference.
escalation_triggers.source_requirement: The escalation must cite SRC-#### bank statement, cash roll-forward, ledger, fraud-dossier, or reconciliation exception evidence.

decision_rules.minimum_evidence: SRC-#### final packet digest, source manifest, cleared compliance_action_plan, current accounting_control.json, no unresolved material breaks, and human-authority basis.
conditions: RBAC ADMIN actor is named.
No critical/high red flag remains unresolved.
No unresolved accounting-control, SEC, PCAOB, IRS, or government-adversary row remains.
No prohibited autonomous act is delegated to GLAW.
decision_rules.audit_entry: Record oversight_decision approve with source, reason, actor, role, conditions, packet digest, and accounting-control digest.

decision_rules.minimum_evidence: SRC-#### blocked control row with owner, next_command, required_fix, missing fields, and materiality posture.
conditions: Owner is a real GLAW seat or human-oversight-board.
Fix can be rerun through the normal gate chain.
Accounting, tax, SEC, or PCAOB remediation must preserve source evidence and rerunnable workpapers.
No filing/signing/transmission occurs during remediation.
decision_rules.audit_entry: Record oversight_decision fix with owner, required_fix, missing fields, materiality posture, and source.

decision_rules.minimum_evidence: SRC-#### defect evidence showing unsupported authority, failed adversary, unresolved red flag, missing source tie-out, material control weakness, or ungrounded legal/tax/accounting proposition.
conditions: Reason names the failed gate.
Matter remains blocked until the owner cures and reruns gates.
Denial is visible in the oversight ledger.
Any attempted filing or transmission remains behind the human seal.
decision_rules.audit_entry: Record oversight_decision deny with failed gate, source, materiality posture, and next owner.

decision_rules.minimum_evidence: SRC-#### safety, ethics, data-integrity, legal-authority, SEC-reporting, tax, audit, fraud, or compliance evidence requiring stop-work.
conditions: Kill-switch is recorded immediately.
Autonomous loop and daemon stop routing.
Resume requires a separate RBAC ADMIN decision.
Any live filing, EDGAR submission, IRS transmission, or audit sign-off remains blocked.
decision_rules.audit_entry: Record kill_switch_halted and oversight_decision halt with source and impacted profiles.

decision_rules.minimum_evidence: SRC-#### evidence that the halt condition was cured, rerun gates passed, and the next route is bounded to analysis/workpaper preparation.
conditions: RBAC ADMIN actor is named.
Resume reason states why the specific halt condition is cured.
Human-only acts remain behind the authority gate.
Accounting, SEC, PCAOB, IRS, and adversarial reruns are referenced when they caused the halt.
decision_rules.audit_entry: Record kill_switch_resumed with actor, role, reason, source, and cured condition.

required_evidence: Every Board escalation or decision should identify a current SRC-#### evidence basis.
Every blocked compliance row must preserve owner, next_command, required_fix, and missing fields.
Every approve/resume path must state the human-seal boundary and RBAC ADMIN actor.
Every fix/deny/halt path must name the gate, owner, and source-backed reason.

Every accounting/tax/SEC/PCAOB approval must cite accounting_control.json, final_packet.json, and the source workpaper digest that proves bank reconciliation, tax tie-out, citation grounding, and government-adversary review.
